title: Claude Fable 5 & Apple’s NVIDIA deal
summary: The Mixture of Experts podcast discusses Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 model and its tier routing system, Apple's announced shift to NVIDIA cloud compute partnership at WWDC 2026 departing from on-device AI, and whether AI models can detect sarcasm with multimodal inputs or context alone.
writeup: This Mixture of Experts episode from IBM Technology covers three topics: Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 and its tier routing system, Apple's announced move to an NVIDIA cloud compute partnership at WWDC 2026 (a departure from its on-device AI approach), and whether AI models can detect sarcasm. The Apple shift matters because it trades local processing for data center infrastructure, changing where inference runs. On sarcasm, the discussion weighs whether multimodal inputs are needed or whether context alone suffices.
